subject: Noise2Map "killed" error
body:
Hi warp list,

I am using Warp 2.0 to denoise my tomograms. Here is the command I used:
********************

Noise2Map \

--observation1 warp_tiltseries/reconstruction/even/ \

--observation2 warp_tiltseries/reconstruction/odd/ \

--observation_combined warp_tiltseries/reconstruction/ \

--3dctf warp_tiltseries/reconstruction/ctf/ \

--dont_augment \

--dont_flatten_spectrum \

--angpix 14.4 \

--iterations 15000

*******************

However, I got the following message in the terminal:

*************
Preparing MACC_1_14.40Apx... Found CTF

...

...

...

Preparing MACC_44_14.40Apx... Killed

**************

Then the Noise2Map job was killed.

I checked the results, no "Denoise" folder generated. The only new files 
generated are the *_scaled.mrc files in the reconstruction/ctf folder. And 
no log files were updated.

I tried to disable the "--3dctf" and "--dont_augment", but did not help, 
got the same message in the termianl.

I have 97 tomograms in this dataset. I am wondering how should I fix this 
issue? Do I need to split the dataset into two small datasets with less 
tomograms?

Thanks

Yunjie
